scripts.build: uv run python -m compileall src tests
scripts.lint: uv run python -m compileall src tests
scripts.report: mkdir -p reports && uv run claimguard-detect --data-dir ../../packages/data-generator/data --top-n 10 --output reports/latest-report.json
scripts.test: uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py'
